pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py explicitly require the target event type to be named 'successful_auth'.
Task instructions and verifier.py explicitly require the scheduled alert to be named 'Shared_Credential_Violation'.
Task instructions and verifier.py explicitly require the target dashboard to be named 'IAM_Security_Posture'.
Verifier script requires the dashboard 'IAM_Security_Posture' to contain at least 2 '<panel>' tags.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an event type named 'successful_auth', an alert named 'Shared_Credential_Violation', and a dashboard named 'IAM_Security_Posture' with a minimum of 2 panels. The data used for this task consists of real-world logs downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub (Zenodo record 8196385).
